tasks_completed.description: M1: Added check_and_consume_allowlist call inside if ! check_systemctl_targets_all_dev block
tasks_completed.changes: Inserted `check_and_consume_allowlist "$COMMAND" && exit 0` at line 805, before the BLOCKED echo and exit 2 inside the inner `if ! check_systemctl_targets_all_dev` block. Mirrors the pattern at lines 984, 995, 1007, 1027, 1110.
tasks_completed.rationale: Allows /allow-granted systemctl commands for non-happy, non-all-dev targets to pass through instead of being unconditionally blocked.

tasks_completed.description: M2: Refactored _evaluate_push to accept data instead of sid, and added _check_git_allowlist call
tasks_completed.changes: Changed `_evaluate_push(command, sid)` to `_evaluate_push(command, data)`. Added `sid = _get_session_id(data)` as first statement. Added `if _check_git_allowlist(command, data): return` after _push_has_forbidden_ref_mutation check and before CLAUDE_PUSH_COMMAND_ACTIVE env check. Updated call site at line 666 from `_evaluate_push(command, sid)` to `_evaluate_push(command, data)`.
tasks_completed.rationale: Enables /allow-granted git push commands to bypass the default-deny block, consistent with the allowlist pattern used in _evaluate_forbidden_plumbing, _evaluate_reset_hard, _evaluate_direct_ref_mutation, _evaluate_merge, and _evaluate_commit.

git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: The allowlist check was missing from the systemctl non-all-dev block and from _evaluate_push, preventing /allow grants from working in those code paths.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Inserted check_and_consume_allowlist in the bash safety hook and _check_git_allowlist in the git privilege guard at the correct positions, matching the existing pattern in both files.

dev.qa_notes: AC1: check_and_consume_allowlist appears at line 805 inside the if ! check_systemctl_targets_all_dev block. AC2: The call is inside the failing-condition branch so non-granted commands still reach exit 2. AC3: _check_git_allowlist called at line 583 in _evaluate_push before _block_default_deny_push. AC4: Without a grant _check_git_allowlist returns False so default-deny path remains. AC5: _push_has_forbidden_ref_mutation check at line 576 precedes _check_git_allowlist at line 583. AC6: Call order in _evaluate_push: (1) _inline_env_present line 574, (2) _push_has_forbidden_ref_mutation line 576, (3) _check_git_allowlist line 583, (4) CLAUDE_PUSH_COMMAND_ACTIVE env check line 586.

self_verification.notes: Python syntax check passed. Grep confirmed check_and_consume_allowlist at line 805, _evaluate_push signature change, sid = _get_session_id(data) added, _check_git_allowlist inserted at correct position, call site updated.
